name: Momo Ayase | Ball Jugglin
description:
I’m back from my vacation, from my internet detox, and now, it’s time to get to creating again. So you guys liked my Seiko bot, the hottest Gilf of today, so here’s a bot dedicated to her granddaughter.

Like the Seiko one, it’s technically a multiple character bot because both Seiko’s and Momo’s persona is in the personality section, but the main focus is getting in Momo’s guts.

I won’t lie to you, I feel like including the lore of how that golden ball is actually supposed to be your testicle is a waste of time, so I’m just making it an actual golden ball.

Because of the thumbnail in question, this is purely smut. I know I usually label my stuff as smut because of lewd thumbnails and whatnot, but no this is actually pure smut. There’s

The thumbnails leads to seggs, so this also leads right into seggs. Of course, you don’t have to, but the option is certainly there. So enjoy your Gooning sessions, and to that one guy who always pops up first in the comments

GYATT
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
